tools.name: discover_capabilities
tools.description: Search the capabilities.txt registry for sites that can do something — by capability id, keyword, or category. Returns matching capabilities with the site that offers them and its conformance grade. To invoke, fetch that site's /capabilities.txt.

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: List every site that publishes a conformant capabilities.txt, with its grade and capability count.

tools.name: get_site
tools.description: Get the full list of capabilities a site declares, by domain.
